sentence: 爸爸退休后每月领养老金。
pinyin: Bàba tuìxiū hòu měi yuè lǐng yǎnglǎojīn.
english: Dad collects his pension every month after retiring.

sentence: 他买了一条黑色皮带来搭这条裤子。
pinyin: Tā mǎile yī tiáo hēisè pídài lái dā zhè tiáo kùzi.
english: He bought a black leather belt to go with these pants.

sentence: 我用胶带把破损的书皮粘好了。
pinyin: Wǒ yòng jiāo dài bǎ pò sǔn de shū pí zhān hǎo le.
english: I used tape to fix the damaged book cover.

sentence: 她拌了一盘凉拌黄瓜当下酒菜。
pinyin: Tā bàn le yī pán liángbàn huángguā dāng xiàjiǔcài.
english: She made a plate of cold cucumber salad to go with the drinks.

sentence: 这个地段的房价比较高。
pinyin: Zhège dì duàn de fáng jià bǐ jiào gāo.
english: Housing prices in this area are relatively high.

sentence: 阳光透过窗帘投射在地板上。
pinyin: Yángguāng tòuguò chuānglián tóushè zài dìbǎn shàng.
english: Sunlight cast through the curtains onto the floor.

sentence: 球队在决赛中失利，非常可惜。
pinyin: Qiú duì zài jué sài zhōng shī lì, fēi cháng kě xī.
english: The team suffered defeat in the final, which was a real shame.

sentence: 他们周末常去舞厅跳舞。
pinyin: Tāmen zhōumò cháng qù wǔtīng tiào wǔ.
english: They often go to the dance hall on weekends.

sentence: 这道题的难点在于理解题意。
pinyin: Zhè dào tí de nándiǎn zàiyú lǐjiě tíyì.
english: The difficulty of this question lies in understanding what it is asking.

sentence: 楼下就有一家药店，很方便。
pinyin: Lóuxià jiù yǒu yī jiā yàodiàn, hěn fāngbiàn.
english: There's a pharmacy right downstairs — very convenient.

meaning: 1. to cross the limit; 2. to be over the accepted norm; 3. excessive
sentence: 检测结果显示这里的噪音超标了。
pinyin: Jiǎn cè jié guǒ xiǎn shì zhè lǐ de zào yīn chāo biāo le.
english: The test results show that the noise level here exceeds the limit.

meaning: to apply for; to bid for
sentence: 这个城市正在申办国际马拉松赛。
pinyin: Zhège chéngshì zhèngzài shēnbàn guójì mǎlāsōng sài.
english: This city is bidding to host an international marathon.

meaning: Measure word; Classifier (in Chinese grammar), measure word
sentence: 学中文时量词是一个难点。
pinyin: Xué Zhōngwén shí liàngcí shì yī gè nándiǎn.
english: Measure words are a difficult point when learning Chinese.

sentence: 垃圾车每天早上七点来收垃圾。
pinyin: Lājī chē měi tiān zǎoshang qī diǎn lái shōu lājī.
english: The garbage truck comes to collect trash every morning at seven.

sentence: 他把自行车停在车库里。
pinyin: Tā bǎ zìxíngchē tíng zài chēkù lǐ.
english: He parked his bicycle in the garage.

sentence: 清明节我们去墓园祭扫。
pinyin: Qīngmíngjié wǒmen qù mùyuán jì sǎo.
english: We go to the cemetery to pay respects on Tomb Sweeping Day.

sentence: 请确认防火墙已开放这个端口。
pinyin: Qǐng quèrèn fánghuǒqiáng yǐ kāifàng zhège duānkǒu.
english: Please confirm that the firewall has opened this port.

sentence: 她不喜欢去夜店，觉得太吵。
pinyin: Tā bù xǐhuān qù yèdiàn, juéde tài chǎo.
english: She doesn't like going to nightclubs; she finds them too noisy.

sentence: 他是互联网行业的新贵。
pinyin: Tā shì hùliánwǎng hángyè de xīnguì.
english: He is a rising star in the internet industry.

sentence: 我更想读这本小说的原著。
pinyin: Wǒ gèng xiǎng dú zhè běn xiǎoshuō de yuánzhù.
english: I'd rather read the original work of this novel.

sentence: 这台空调的功率是两千瓦。
pinyin: Zhè tái kōngtiáo de gōnglǜ shì liǎng qiānwǎ.
english: This air conditioner has a power of two kilowatts.

sentence: 今晚有一场钢琴专场演出。
pinyin: Jīnwǎn yǒu yī chǎng gāngqín zhuānchǎng yǎnchū.
english: There is a special piano performance tonight.

sentence: 新闻报道了昨天的坠机事故。
pinyin: Xīnwén bàodào le zuótiān de zhuìjī shìgù.
english: The news reported yesterday's airplane crash accident.

meaning: 1. big shot; 2. top gun; 3. superstar; 4. VIP
sentence: 他是当地有名的房地产大亨。
pinyin: Tā shì dāngdì yǒumíng de fángdìchǎn dàhēng.
english: He is a well-known local real estate tycoon.

sentence: 药店里有各种品牌的避孕套。
pinyin: Yàodiàn lǐ yǒu gè zhǒng pǐnpái de bìyùntào.
english: The pharmacy carries various brands of condoms.

meaning: 1. to require a solution; 2. to seek to solve (an equation)
sentence: 老师教我们如何求解这道方程。
pinyin: Lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen rúhé qiújiě zhè dào fāngchéng.
english: The teacher taught us how to solve this equation.

sentence: 这家餐厅的服务是第一流的。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng de fúwù shì dìyīliú de.
english: This restaurant's service is first-class.

meaning: 1. to step into the new year; 2. New Year
sentence: 我们一起去广场跨年吧。
pinyin: Wǒmen yīqǐ qù guǎngchǎng kuànián ba.
english: Let's go to the plaza together to ring in the New Year.

sentence: 她考上了北大化学系。
pinyin: Tā kǎo shàng le Běidà huàxué xì.
english: She got into Peking University's department of chemistry.

sentence: 开启网络加速器后，网页加载快多了。
pinyin: Kāiqǐ wǎngluò jiāsùqì hòu, wǎngyè jiāzài kuài duō le.
english: After turning on the network accelerator, web pages load much faster.

sentence: 她的衣柜里塞满了衣服。
pinyin: Tā de yīguì lǐ sāi mǎn le yīfú.
english: Her wardrobe is stuffed full of clothes.

sentence: 双方正在就合同细节进行商议。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng zhèngzài jiù hétong xìjié jìnxíng shāngyì.
english: Both sides are currently negotiating the details of the contract.

meaning: 1. variant of 匯編|汇编[huì biān]
sentence: 老师把同学的作文汇编成册。
pinyin: Lǎoshī bǎ tóngxué de zuòwén huìbiān chéng cè.
english: The teacher compiled the students' essays into a booklet.

sentence: 爱因斯坦提出了相对论。
pinyin: Àiyīnsītǎn tíchū le xiāngduìlùn.
english: Einstein proposed the theory of relativity.

meaning: 1. bone ash; 2. ashes of the dead
sentence: 家人将他的骨灰撒入大海。
pinyin: Jiārén jiāng tā de gǔhuī sǎ rù dàhǎi.
english: His family scattered his ashes into the sea.

meaning: 1. checked pattern; 2. square box character (in Chinese text) indicati
sentence: 她买了一件方格衬衫。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī jiàn fānggé chènshān.
english: She bought a checked shirt.

sentence: 他午饭只吃了一份色拉。
pinyin: Tā wǔfàn zhǐ chī le yī fèn sèlā.
english: He only had a salad for lunch.

sentence: 古罗马的建筑至今仍令人叹服。
pinyin: Gǔ Luómǎ de jiànzhù zhìjīn réng lìng rén tànfú.
english: The architecture of ancient Rome still impresses people today.

sentence: 这片农场大约有五十英亩。
pinyin: Zhè piàn nóngchǎng dàyuē yǒu wǔshí yīngmǔ.
english: This farm is about fifty acres in size.

sentence: 孩子得了热病，需要好好休息。
pinyin: Háizi dé le rèbìng, xūyào hǎohǎo xiūxi.
english: The child has a fever and needs to rest well.

sentence: 信任是友谊的基石。
pinyin: Xìnrèn shì yǒuyì de jīshí.
english: Trust is the cornerstone of friendship.

sentence: 该组织致力于帮助第三世界国家发展。
pinyin: Gāi zǔzhī zhìlì yú bāngzhù dìsān shìjiè guójiā fāzhǎn.
english: The organization is dedicated to helping Third World countries develop.

sentence: 一只麻雀停在窗台上叫。
pinyin: Yī zhī máquè tíng zài chuāngtái shàng jiào.
english: A sparrow perched on the windowsill and chirped.

meaning: 1. to seat (sb in a restaurant etc); 2. to take one's seat
sentence: 请大家按照号码入座。
pinyin: Qǐng dàjiā ànzhào hàomǎ rùzuò.
english: Please take your seats according to your numbers.

meaning: 1. to finalize (a design etc); 2. stereotype; 3. permanent wave or per
sentence: 方案还没定型，随时可以修改。
pinyin: Fāng'àn hái méi dìngxíng, suíshí kěyǐ xiūgǎi.
english: The plan hasn't been finalized yet; it can be changed at any time.

sentence: 中药里常用红花来活血。
pinyin: Zhōngyào lǐ cháng yòng hónghuā lái huóxuè.
english: Safflower is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to improve blood circulation.

sentence: 他们在背地里密谋对付竞争对手。
pinyin: Tāmen zài bèidì lǐ mìmóu duìfù jìngzhēng duìshǒu.
english: They conspired behind the scenes against their competitor.

meaning: 1. to shut out; 2. to block; 3. to smother
sentence: 该账号因违规被平台封杀。
pinyin: Gāi zhànghào yīn wéiguī bèi píngtái fēngshā.
english: The account was banned by the platform for violating the rules.

sentence: 雅典是古希腊最著名的城邦之一。
pinyin: Yǎdiǎn shì gǔ Xīlà zuì zhùmíng de chéngbāng zhī yī.
english: Athens is one of the most famous city-states of ancient Greece.

sentence: 今天的天气极好，适合出游。
pinyin: Jīntiān de tiānqì jí hǎo, shìhé chūyóu.
english: The weather today is excellent, perfect for an outing.
